name: Token-2022 Extension Auditor (Mintoscope)
description: Audits Solana Token-2022 mints for configuration risk: detects every extension, decomposes authorities (live vs renounced), assigns SAFE/CAUTION/HIGH/CRITICAL severity, flags dangerous/version-dependent extension combinations, and prescribes fixes. Pre- and post-deploy. Complements solana-vulnerability-scanner (program logic) and birdeye (market risk) without overlap.
safety: clean (RPC reads only; no executables bundled, no keys required)
